mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('SQ_REQUEST_KEY')
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST ( REQUEST_KEY, RES_NO, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, REQ_BUY_TYPE_CD, SERVICE_TYPE_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, ON_OFF_TYPE_CD, PRO_STTUS_CD, SBSC_PRO_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, PRNTS_CONTRACT_NUM, REQ_USIM_SN, CRET_DT, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, REC_YN ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, LPAD(#{requestKey}::text, 14, '0'), '0', #{agentCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cntpntShopId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'UU', 'PO', 'NAC3', 'NA', 'S', '7', '00', '00', #{ncn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ncn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqUsimSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), 'N', 'N', 'N' )
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_OSST ( REQUEST_KEY, MVNO_ORD_NO, SVC_CNTR_NO, PRGR_STAT_CD, CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{mvnoOrdNo}, #{svcCntrNo}, #{prgrStatCd}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey, MVNO_ORD_NO AS mvnoOrdNo, OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo, PRGR_STAT_CD AS prgrStatCd, SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo, RSLT_CD AS rsltCd, RSLT_MSG AS rsltMsg, TLPH_NO AS tlphNo, TLPH_NO_STAT_CD AS tlphNoStatCd, ENCD_TLPH_NO AS encdTlphNo, TLPH_NO_OWN_CMPN_CD AS tlphNoOwnCmpnCd, ASGN_AGNC_ID AS asgnAgncId, NSTEP_GLOBAL_ID AS nstepGlobalId FROM MSF_REQUEST_OSST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS "requestKey", RES_NO AS "resNo", CONTRACT_NUM AS "contractNum", PRNTS_CONTRACT_NUM AS "prntsContractNum", REQ_USIM_SN AS "reqUsimSn", AGENT_CD AS "agentCode", CNTPNT_SHOP_CD AS "cntpntShopId" FROM MSF_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
